## DaprCommandArchiveStore Class

DAPR state store implementation of [ICommandArchiveStore](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Commands.ICommandArchiveStore.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Commands\.ICommandArchiveStore')\.
Archive writes are advisory per enforcement rule \#12 \-\- failures are logged but never thrown\.
